summary: Generic menu-state middleware with scheduled redraws and named input dispatch for complex embedded UIs.
notes: Call MenuView_DispatchNamedInput(button->name, (uint32_t)event) from MultiButton_OnEvent(...) to route button events into the menu state machine.
Render the current page by overriding MenuView_OnRender(...), and handle enter/back/value actions in MenuView_OnCommand(...).
sources: Generic hierarchical embedded menu state-machine pattern.
